title: Committee Canonical Schema
$comment: Last modified on 2026-03-10 by Hans Bot - NEN.

committeeName.description: List of local names for the committee in different languages. Each entry includes the language code and the corresponding local name.

organization.$comment: Is this the same as the 'SDO' as defined in the nenDefinitions? -> JA

externalCommittee.description: Indicates whether the committee is external to NEN (true) or NEN internal (false).
externalCommittee.$comment: consider renaming into a more positive 'NenCommittee'

costCenter.comment: is this relevant outside the business administration domain? If so, we need to define the format and semantics of this property.

costCenterDescription.$comment: reads like a compound object with a number and a description

active.description: Please note that the indication 'active' is not always consistent with the terminatedAt value

createdAt.description: The date and time when the committee was created. Date must be in the past

endedAt.description: The date and time when the committee was decommissioned.

updatedAt.description: The date and time when the committee was last updated.

responsiblePerson.description: The consultant responsible for the committee

employeeId.$comment: in SAP 'verantwoordelijke persoon', opgevoerd als 'secretaris' (responsible person)

committeeMembers.description: List of committee member ids. To be used as path parameter in an API link
